response.overview: In the 1800s, a charismatic stranger arrives at a bustling coastal town, immediately winning over the locals with his charm and mysterious air. Seeking peace, he wanders to the harbor, where the gentle rhythm of the sea usually soothes him. But today, tranquility is shattered when he spots a seabird struggling, coated in black oil—a stark reminder that even in serene places, darkness can seep in.
response.tagline: Even the calmest seas hide darkness.
response.title: The Greedy Songbird She Was
